product_overview: NELHEALTHCOACH is a multi-step health intake form that collects detailed personal, medical, lifestyle, and wellbeing information from new coaching clients. It guides users through consent, assessment, document upload, and final submission to create a personalized client profile.
core_goals: Complete a structured health intake form across all required steps
Collect accurate personal, medical, lifestyle, and mental health information
Upload optional medical documents to support the intake
Submit the completed form and reach the confirmation page

features.name: Coaching Service Contract
features.description: Users review the service contract and choose whether to continue with the intake process.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Read the full contract -> Accept the contract -> Continue to the next step
Navigate to / -> Read the full contract -> Reject the contract -> Exit the intake process

features.name: Objectives and Expectations
features.description: Users define their main goals, motivation, commitment level, prior coaching experience, and target date.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Accept the contract -> Review the objectives step -> Select motivation goals -> Adjust commitment level -> Select previous coaching experience -> Set a target date -> Continue to the next step

features.name: Personal Data Collection
features.description: Users enter their personal and demographic information and optionally upload a profile photo.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Accept the contract -> Complete the objectives step -> Review the personal data step -> Fill in name and contact details -> Fill in birth date and demographic details -> Fill in education and occupation details -> Upload a profile photo -> Continue to the next step

features.name: Basic Medical History
features.description: Users provide their primary complaint, current medications, supplements, medical conditions, allergies, surgeries, employment, and hobbies.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Accept the contract -> Complete the objectives step -> Complete personal data -> Review the basic medical history step -> Fill in the main complaint -> List medications and supplements -> Select medical conditions -> Fill in allergies, surgeries, employment, and hobbies -> Continue to the next step

features.name: Health Evaluations Questionnaire
features.description: Users answer a multi-domain health evaluation covering diet, sleep, circadian rhythm, toxicity, and gut health.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Accept the contract -> Complete the objectives step -> Complete personal data -> Complete basic medical history -> Review the health evaluations step -> Answer the frequency-based health questions -> Select yes, no, or maybe for each evaluation -> Continue to the next step

features.name: Mental Health Assessment
features.description: Users complete multiple-choice and open-ended questions about emotional wellbeing, support, and stress management.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Accept the contract -> Complete the objectives step -> Complete personal data -> Complete basic medical history -> Complete health evaluations -> Review the mental health step -> Answer the multiple-choice wellbeing questions -> Write responses about feelings, support systems, and stress management -> Continue to the next step

features.name: Lifestyle Context Assessment
features.description: Users describe their daily routine, cooking habits, activity level, exercise access, limitations, and preferred workouts.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Accept the contract -> Complete the objectives step -> Complete personal data -> Complete basic medical history -> Complete health evaluations -> Complete mental health assessment -> Review the lifestyle context step -> Describe weekday and weekend routines -> Select cooking responsibility and activity level -> Select physical limitations and gym access -> Choose preferred exercises -> Specify available exercise time -> Continue to the next step

features.name: Medical Document Upload
features.description: Users optionally upload supporting medical documents such as lab results, imaging, prescriptions, diagnoses, and specialist reports.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Accept the contract -> Complete the objectives step -> Complete personal data -> Complete basic medical history -> Complete health evaluations -> Complete mental health assessment -> Complete lifestyle context -> Review the documents step -> Upload one or more medical documents -> See the uploaded file list -> Continue to the next step

Navigate to / -> Accept the contract -> Complete the objectives step -> Complete personal data -> Complete basic medical history -> Complete health evaluations -> Complete mental health assessment -> Complete lifestyle context -> Review the documents step -> Drag and drop a medical document -> See the uploaded file list -> Continue to the next step

features.name: Form Submission
features.description: Users review the completed intake and submit it for processing, then reach the confirmation and thank-you pages.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Accept the contract -> Complete the objectives step -> Complete personal data -> Complete basic medical history -> Complete health evaluations -> Complete mental health assessment -> Complete lifestyle context -> Upload documents if desired -> Complete the final review -> Submit the form -> See the success step -> Navigate to /thank-you and see the thank-you page

routes.description: Main multi-step health intake form with contract, personal data, medical history, health evaluations, mental health, lifestyle, documents, and success steps
routes.notes: The form has 9 steps in this exact order: 0-Contract, 1-Objectives, 2-PersonalData, 3-BasicMedical, 4-HealthEvaluations, 5-MentalHealth, 6-LifestyleContext, 7-Documents, 8-Success. Users progress sequentially. Each step has Atrás (back) and Siguiente (next) buttons.

features.name: Coaching Service Contract
features.description: Display and accept/reject the legal coaching service contract (HIPAA-compliant, California law). This is STEP 0 — the first screen users see.
user_interactions: Read the full legal contract with 12 clauses

features.name: Personal Data Collection
features.description: STEP 2 after objectives. Collect personal information including name, contact, demographics, and profile photo upload. Appears after Objectives step, not directly after contract.
user_interactions: Fill in name, address, phone, email fields
Fill in birth date, gender, age, weight, height
Fill in marital status, education, occupation

features.name: Basic Medical History
features.description: Collect main complaint, medications, supplements, medical conditions, allergies, surgeries
user_interactions: Fill main complaint with intensity, impact, and duration

features.name: Health Evaluations Questionnaire
features.description: 7-section health evaluation covering carb addiction, leptin resistance, circadian rhythms, sleep hygiene, electrosmog, toxicity, and microbiota health
user_interactions: Answer frequency-based questions for 7 health domains
Select yes/no/maybe options for each evaluation

features.name: Mental Health Assessment
features.description: 14 multiple-choice and 3 open-ended emotional wellbeing questions
user_interactions: Answer 14 multiple-choice questions about emotional wellbeing
Write 3 open-ended responses about feelings, support systems, and stress management

features.name: Lifestyle Context Assessment
features.description: Collect lifestyle information including daily routine, cooking habits, activity level, physical limitations, and exercise preferences
user_interactions: Describe typical weekday and weekend schedule
Select activity level and physical limitations
Select gym access and preferred exercises

features.name: Medical Document Upload
features.description: Upload optional medical documents (lab results, imaging, prescriptions, diagnoses, specialist reports)

features.name: Form Submission
features.description: Submit the complete health intake form to the backend API with encrypted data
user_interactions: Navigate to thank-you page on success

features.name: Objectives and Expectations
features.description: STEP 1 after contract. Collect client goals, motivation level, commitment, previous coaching experience, and target date. This step appears immediately after accepting the contract, BEFORE personal data.
user_interactions: Select motivation checkboxes (health improvement, weight goals, athletic performance, etc.)

known_limitations.issue: Profile photo upload requires backend API running on port 3001 for S3 presigned URLs
known_limitations.impact: File upload tests will fail if backend is not accessible

known_limitations.issue: Form submission creates real client data in MongoDB - tests should use unique temporary data
known_limitations.impact: Tests must clean up submitted test data after execution

known_limitations.issue: The app runs in dev mode (Turbopack single-threaded) which limits concurrent test load
known_limitations.impact: TestSprite will cap at 15 high-priority tests to prevent server overload

known_limitations.issue: Face photo upload is skippable via NEXT_PUBLIC_SKIP_PHOTO=true env flag (already configured)
known_limitations.impact: When flag is true, the photo is optional and tests can proceed past Personal Data step
